name: Crunchy Munchy Pizza Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a sheet of wax paper on a microwave-safe plate.
2. Cut the pita bread in half to form two thin circles.
3. Place the circles on the wax paper.
4. Spread butter evenly on the rough side of each circle.
5. Sprinkle each circle with half of the garlic powder, oregano, and cheese.
6. Sprinkle each circle with paprika.
7. Cut each circle into 4 triangles using scissors or a knife.
8. Arrange the triangles to form a circle around the edge of the plate.
9. Microwave on high for 1 minute. Turn the plate halfway around.
10. Microwave on high for an additional 1 minute.
11. If the pita triangles are not crisp, microwave on high for 10-30 seconds more.
12. Let cool for 2 minutes.
